hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path" 2>/dev/null ;; *.sh) shfmt -w -i 2 -ci "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path" 2>/dev/null ;; *.md) rumdl fmt --silent -- "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
